# NexaCorp — Engineering Tomorrow's Success

## About
NexaCorp is a business technology solutions company that delivers cutting-edge consulting and development services for forward-thinking enterprises. Founded with the mission of engineering tomorrow's success, NexaCorp partners with businesses of all sizes — from early-stage startups to Fortune 500 enterprises — to drive measurable digital transformation.

## Services

### Custom Software Development
End-to-end software development tailored to your business needs. From web applications to enterprise platforms, we build scalable, maintainable solutions using modern technology stacks.

### Data Analytics
Transform raw data into actionable insights. Our analytics team helps you implement data pipelines, dashboards, and predictive models that inform strategic decisions.

### Cybersecurity
Protect your digital assets with comprehensive security assessments, penetration testing, compliance auditing, and ongoing monitoring. We help you stay ahead of evolving threats.

### Strategy Consulting
Align your technology investments with business objectives. Our consultants bring deep industry expertise to help you navigate digital transformation with clarity and confidence.

### Team Augmentation
Scale your development capacity with vetted senior engineers who integrate seamlessly with your existing teams. Flexible engagement models from short-term projects to long-term partnerships.

### Cloud Solutions
Migrate, optimize, and manage your cloud infrastructure. We work with AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud to design architectures that balance performance, cost, and reliability.

## Pricing Plans

### Starter — $29/month
- Up to 10 hours consulting
- Email support
- Basic analytics dashboard
- Monthly progress reports

### Professional — $79/month
- Up to 40 hours consulting
- Priority support
- Advanced analytics
- Weekly progress reports
- Dedicated project manager

### Enterprise — $199/month
- Unlimited consulting hours
- 24/7 premium support
- Custom analytics solutions
- Daily progress reports
- Dedicated team
- Custom SLA

## Key Metrics
- 500+ projects delivered
- 98% client satisfaction rate
- 150+ enterprise clients
- 10+ years of experience

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What services does NexaCorp offer?
We offer a comprehensive suite of technology services including custom software development, data analytics, cybersecurity, strategic consulting, team augmentation, and cloud solutions. Each service is tailored to meet your specific business needs.

### How long does a typical project take?
Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. A typical project ranges from 4-12 weeks. During our initial consultation, we provide a detailed timeline with milestones so you always know what to expect.

### Do you work with startups or only enterprises?
We work with businesses of all sizes, from early-stage startups to Fortune 500 enterprises. Our flexible engagement models allow us to scale our services to match your needs and budget.

### What is your pricing model?
We offer flexible pricing including fixed-price projects, monthly retainers, and time-and-materials engagements. Our plans page gives a starting point, but we customize proposals based on your specific requirements.

### How do you ensure project quality?
Quality is built into every step of our process. We use agile methodologies, automated testing, code reviews, and continuous integration. Every project includes dedicated QA resources and regular client check-ins.

### What happens after the project is delivered?
We provide ongoing support and maintenance packages to ensure your solution continues to perform optimally. This includes bug fixes, performance monitoring, feature updates, and 24/7 emergency support.
